overall_assessment: Within the permitted dispatch-only review surface, there is not enough evidence to validate regression protection, assertion effectiveness, test realism, or CI-worthiness. The dispatch describes the audit goals and points at a bounded package, but it does not itself provide the tests, assertions, validation traces, or contract evidence needed to distinguish real behavior coverage from pass-the-test repair.
recommended_path: Do not count this lane as passing from the dispatch-only packet. Re-run the test-quality lane with the bounded round package and its concrete test evidence in scope so the audit can verify real-backend behavior coverage, assertion quality, and anti-shortcut compliance.

findings.title: Dispatch-only packet is insufficient for a bounded test-quality decision
findings.rationale: The dispatch requires judgment about regression protection, assertion effectiveness, test realism, CI execution, and anti-mock or fallback compliance, but the permitted review surface contains only instructions and a pointer to the bounded package. Without the referenced package or any in-scope test evidence, this lane cannot honestly verify whether the changed tests reflect real contract behavior or only pass-the-test repair.
findings.suggested_action: Provide the bounded round package and its concrete test evidence to this lane, then rerun the audit instead of inferring a pass from the dispatch metadata alone.
